traits.name: Adrenaline
traits.description: When you enter critical health, you will receive a small Stamina boost.

traits.name: Ambidextrous
traits.description: Quicker reloading of matched pairs, and custom clip reloads for semi-auto pistol sets.

weapon_synergies.reason: Ambidextrous speeds up the custom clip reload for semi-auto pistols like the Bornheim.
Ambidextrous speeds up reloading matched pairs, but the Conversion is a revolver, not semi-auto.
Ambidextrous speeds up reloading matched pairs, but the Auto-5 is a shotgun, not a pistol.
Ambidextrous speeds up the custom clip reload for semi-auto pistols like the Dolch.
Ambidextrous speeds up reloading matched pairs, but the Derringer is not semi-auto.

traits.name: Assailant
traits.description: Increases melee effectiveness of Throwing Knives and Throwing Axes. Melee weapons found in the World can be thrown.

weapon_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee effectiveness of throwing knives/axes, not the saber itself.
Assailant increases melee effectiveness of throwing knives/axes, not the combat axe.
Assailant increases melee effectiveness of throwing knives/axes, not the hammer.
Assailant allows throwing the Slate's melee as a projectile, increasing ranged melee options.

traits.name: Beastface
traits.description: Reduced reaction range of animals (doesn't affect Monsters like Hellhounds).

traits.name: Berserker
traits.description: All melee attacks do double damage.

traits.name: Blade Seer
traits.description: Bolts, arrows, throwing axes, and throwing knives are highlighted in Dark Sight for better visibility. Also applies to Beetle view. (25m).

weapon_synergies.reason: Blade Seer highlights the Saber in Dark Sight, aiding in tracking thrown melee weapons.
Blade Seer highlights the Axe in Dark Sight, helping locate it after throwing.
Blade Seer highlights the Hammer in Dark Sight, useful for retrieval after throwing.
Blade Seer highlights the Slate's melee in Dark Sight, aiding in tracking thrown attacks.

traits.name: Bloodless
traits.description: Bleeding will not escalate from light to medium or intense bleeding.

traits.name: Bolt Thrower
traits.description: Reduced reload time for Crossbows.

weapon_synergies.reason: Bolt Thrower reduces reload time for crossbows, but Bow is not a crossbow; no benefit.
Bolt Thrower reduces crossbow reload time, increasing DPS and follow-up shot speed.

traits.name: Bulletgrubber
traits.description: Recover the unfired round when performing partial reloads.

traits.name: Bulwark
traits.description: Reduce the damage from explosions and Bomb Lance harpoon attacks by 50%. Vastly reduces the duration of being fully blinded by a Flash Bomb.

traits.name: Conduit
traits.description: Get a Health and Stamina boost when your team picks up a Clue or closes a Rift.

traits.name: Dauntless
traits.description: Thrown Explosives can be defused when interacting with them.

traits.name: Deadeye Scopesmith
traits.description: Remain in scope view after firing a shot while using any weapon with a short scope (Deadeye variants).

traits.name: Death Cheat
traits.description: You will not lose your Hunter if you fail to extract, but equipment and missing Health Chunks will be lost.

traits.name: Decoy Supply
traits.description: Restock all types of Decoys from ammo crates.

traits.name: Determination
traits.description: Stamina recovery starts 1 second sooner.

traits.name: Doctor
traits.description: Doubles the amount of Health restored by First Aid Kits.

traits.name: Fanning
traits.description: Faster rate of fire when using 1-handed single-action pistols.

weapon_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action pistols, but Bornheim is semi-auto; no benefit.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers; New Army is single-action.
Fanning boosts fire rate for single-action pistols; Conversion Pistol is single-action.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers; Pax is single-action.
Fanning only works on single-action pistols; Dolch 96 is semi-auto, no benefit.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers; LeMat is single-action.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers; Nagant M1895 is single-action.
Fanning only works on single-action pistols; Officer is double-action, no benefit.
Fanning only works on single-action revolvers; Derringer is not a revolver, no benefit.
Fanning drastically increases the Scottfield's fire rate, making it a close-range powerhouse.

traits.name: Frontiersman
traits.description: Carried Tools can be used one extra time.

traits.name: Gator Legs
traits.description: Walk and sprint faster in deep water. Also make less noise while crouched in water.

traits.name: Ghoul
traits.description: Killing Monsters restores 5 Health.

traits.name: Greyhound
traits.description: Sprint at full speed for a longer duration.

traits.name: Hornskin
traits.description: Reduce damage taken from blunt melee by 25%. Useful when fighting Armoreds and group of regular Grunts.

traits.name: Hundred Hands
traits.description: Increases the damage of a Bow by 10% and reduces sway while at full draw. Allows use of arrows in melee attacks.

weapon_synergies.reason: Hundred Hands boosts bow damage and reduces sway, improving accuracy and lethality at full draw.
Hundred Hands increases crossbow damage and reduces sway, making shots more consistent and deadly.

traits.name: Iron Eye
traits.description: Remain in iron sights between shots when firing bolt-action, lever-action, and pump-action weapons.

weapon_synergies.reason: Iron Eye keeps you in ironsights between shots, maintaining aim for faster follow-up shots.
Iron Eye allows staying in ironsights between pump-action shots, improving target tracking.
Iron Eye keeps you in ironsights after each shot, enabling quicker follow-up shots.
Iron Eye is not applicable; Crown & King is semi-auto, not pump/bolt/lever.
Iron Eye keeps you in ironsights between shots, useful for the Drilling's rifle and shotgun modes.
Allows faster follow-up shots by keeping the sight picture after each bolt-action cycle.
Iron Eye does not affect revolvers; it only works on bolt/lever/pump actions.
Keeps sights aligned after levering, enabling quicker consecutive shots.
Maintains iron sight view after bolt cycling for faster target reacquisition.
Iron Eye does not apply to single-shot shotguns; only bolt/lever/pump actions.
Keeps sights up after pump action, allowing rapid follow-up shots.
Remains in iron sights after bolt cycle, improving shot consistency.
Stays in iron sights after bolt action, aiding quick follow-up shots.
Lets you stay aimed between lever-action shots, improving follow-up accuracy with the shotgun.
Keeps you in iron sights between lever-action shots, maintaining aim for quick follow-ups.
Allows continuous aiming through lever cycles, boosting accuracy and fire rate control.
Enables staying aimed between lever-action shots, enhancing precision and speed.
Remain scoped between lever cycles, improving accuracy and follow-up shot speed.

traits.name: Kiteskin
traits.description: Significantly reduces fall damage.

traits.name: Levering
traits.description: Faster rate of fire from the hip when using lever-action weapons.

weapon_synergies.reason: Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action, making it deadly in close quarters.
Boosts hip-fire rate for lever-action shotgun, allowing rapid close-range blasts.
Speeds up hip-fire levering, enabling faster shotgun follow-ups in melee range.
Levering increases hip-fire rate, maximizing the Winfield's lever-action spam potential at close range.
Levering boosts hip-fire rate, making the compact Winfield even deadlier in close-quarters spam.
Levering offsets the Centennial's slower fire rate by enabling rapid hip-fire spam.

traits.name: Lightfoot
traits.description: Vault, fall, and climb ladders silently. Also reduces the sound of walking through noise traps.

traits.name: Magpie
traits.description: Receive three short effects when picking up a Bounty Token: Antidote, Stamina, and Regeneration. SOLO: Dark Sight Boost capacity in all Boost sources are doubled.

traits.name: Martialist
traits.description: Allows a Katana to be sheathed, which enables a first strike attack that does extra damage.

traits.name: Mithridatist
traits.description: Drastically reduces the time needed to recover from poisoning. (Recovery time reduced by 75%)

traits.name: Necromancer
traits.description: Using Dark Sight, revive a downed partner from a distance. (25m) SOLO: You can revive your downed Hunter. Triggers a Full Health Restoration upon revive.

traits.name: Packmule
traits.description: Receive an additional Tool or Consumable when looting players or opening item boxes.

traits.name: Peacekeeper
traits.description: Dead (red-skulled) teammates can be revived at the cost of burning some of your Health Chunks. Looting a dead Hunter will restore one Health Chunk.

traits.name: Physician
traits.description: Reduce the time needed to bandage. (Bandage time reduced by 50%)

traits.name: Pitcher
traits.description: Increased throwing range for all items using the aim helper. (Throwing range increased by 50%)

weapon_synergies.reason: Pitcher extends throw range, allowing Bomb Lance explosive harpoons to hit targets from safer distances.

traits.name: Poacher
traits.description: Place and disarm traps quietly.

traits.name: Poison Sense
traits.description: You can see nearby poisoned Hunters while in Dark Sight. Also applies to Beetle view. (150m)

traits.name: Quartermaster
traits.description: Can equip a medium slot Weapon in addition to a large slot Weapon.

traits.name: Rampage
traits.description: Killing an enemy Hunter while at least one Health Chunk is empty triggers a Restoration for your Hunter.

traits.name: Relentless
traits.description: Your Hunter won't lose a Health Chunk when downed.

traits.name: Remedy
traits.description: Using Dark Sight, interact with a Trait Spur within range to trigger a Restoration effect similar to banishing for your team's Hunters. (25m)

traits.name: Resilience
traits.description: Your Hunter is revived with up to full Health.

traits.name: Salveskin
traits.description: While alive, reduce all fire damage and stop burn speed and stop time from escalating. (Fire damage reduced by 25%)

traits.name: Scopesmith
traits.description: Remain in scope view after firing a shot while using any weapon with a scope.

traits.name: Serpent
traits.description: Using Dark Sight, interact with nearby Clues, Rifts, Banishable Targets, and abandoned Bounty from a safe distance. (25m) SOLO: Interaction range increased. (50m)

traits.name: Shadow
traits.description: Monsters can't see you, but they can still hear you.

traits.name: Silent Killer
traits.description: Reduces the sound you make when performing melee attacks.

traits.name: Sniper Scopesmith
traits.description: Remain in scope view after firing a shot while using any weapon with a long scope (Sniper variants).

traits.name: Steady Aim
traits.description: Weapon sway gradually lessens and stops when you're looking through a scope or aperture sights.

traits.name: Steady Hand
traits.description: Weapon sway gradually lessens when you're looking through the scope of a pistol or a stock-less weapon (applies to 2-slot weapons with a scope).

weapon_synergies.reason: Steady Hand reduces sway on the Bornheim's scope, improving accuracy during rapid follow-up shots.
Steady Hand stabilizes the Conversion Pistol's scope sway, enabling more precise long-range shots.
Steady Hand tightens Dolch's scope sway, enhancing accuracy for its high-damage semi-auto fire.
Steady Hand reduces Derringer's scope sway, making its precise shots more reliable at range.

traits.name: Vigilant
traits.description: Nearby traps and active Beetles are highlighted in Dark Sight. Also applies to Beetle view. (25m)

traits.name: Vigor
traits.description: While in Dark Sight, doubles the rate at which Health and Stamina regenerate.

traits.name: Vulture
traits.description: Looting a Hunter will always reward you money.

traits.name: Whispersmith
traits.description: Reduces noise when selecting equipment.

traits.name: Witness
traits.description: While in Dark Sight, dead Hunters and Monsters are visible and health restoration is marginally increased when close. Also highlighted in Beetle view. (75m)

weapons.name: Baseball Bat
weapons.description: The Baseball Bat swings intuitively and easily, delivering a solid blow.

weapons.name: Berthier Mle 1892
weapons.description: The lighter alternative to the Lebel 1886, the Berthier Mle 1892 is a bolt-action mousqueton that doesn't lose power for the sake of its convenience.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye keeps you in ironsights between shots, maintaining aim for faster follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Bomb Lance
weapons.description: Adapted for combat on land, this explosive harpoon can be fired short distances and deals tremendous damage on direct impact.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher extends throw range, allowing Bomb Lance explosive harpoons to hit targets from safer distances.

weapons.name: Bornheim No. 3
weapons.description: This early German semi-automatic pistol can release a hail of accurate fire by virtue of its low recoil. Reloads via a five-round magazine, or by topping up rounds individually.

trait_synergies.reason: Ambidextrous speeds up the custom clip reload for semi-auto pistols like the Bornheim.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action pistols, but Bornheim is semi-auto; no benefit.
Steady Hand reduces sway on the Bornheim's scope, improving accuracy during rapid follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Bow
weapons.description: Able to pierce through flesh and bone at a great distance, the Hunting Bow will make quick, stealthy work of monsters and men.

trait_synergies.reason: Bolt Thrower reduces reload time for crossbows, but Bow is not a crossbow; no benefit.
Hundred Hands boosts bow damage and reduces sway, improving accuracy and lethality at full draw.

weapons.name: Caldwell 92 New Army
weapons.description: Fast, light, and easy to handle, this double-action revolver has a distinguished counter-clockwise rotating cylinder that swings out to effortlessly reload its six .38 bullets.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers; New Army is single-action.

weapons.name: Caldwell Conversion Pistol
weapons.description: The Caldwell Conversion Pistol is a single-action six-shot revolver. Slow to reload but sturdy and reliable.

trait_synergies.reason: Ambidextrous speeds up reloading matched pairs, but the Conversion is a revolver, not semi-auto.
Fanning boosts fire rate for single-action pistols; Conversion Pistol is single-action.
Steady Hand stabilizes the Conversion Pistol's scope sway, enabling more precise long-range shots.

weapons.name: Caldwell Marathon
weapons.description: Fast-firing pump-action rifle that performs best at mid-range. A clunky reload reduces its flexibility.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye allows staying in ironsights between pump-action shots, improving target tracking.

weapons.name: Caldwell Pax
weapons.description: This iconic single-action six round revolver needs no further introduction. Robust, powerful, and accurate, it brought peace to the once lawless West.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers; Pax is single-action.

weapons.name: Caldwell Rival 78
weapons.description: Sturdy, break-action, side-by-side shotgun with a medium-length barrel that can destroy all but the toughest targets at close range.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye keeps you in ironsights after each shot, enabling quicker follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Cavalry Saber
weapons.description: Regulation cavalry saber in use since the Civil War. Lightweight with good reach.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee effectiveness of throwing knives/axes, not the saber itself.
Blade Seer highlights the Saber in Dark Sight, aiding in tracking thrown melee weapons.

weapons.name: Combat Axe
weapons.description: A heavy two-handed melee weapon that can split open the toughest of enemies with ease.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee effectiveness of throwing knives/axes, not the combat axe.
Blade Seer highlights the Axe in Dark Sight, helping locate it after throwing.

weapons.name: Crossbow
weapons.description: Imaginative hand crossbow that fires compact bolts. Excels in situations when discretion is required above all. Bolts can be retrieved and re-used.

trait_synergies.reason: Bolt Thrower reduces crossbow reload time, increasing DPS and follow-up shot speed.
Hundred Hands increases crossbow damage and reduces sway, making shots more consistent and deadly.

weapons.name: Crown & King Auto-5
weapons.description: Prototype long-barreled semi-automatic shotgun with internal four round magazine plus one in the chamber. High power and rate of fire, but strong recoil and short range.

trait_synergies.reason: Ambidextrous speeds up reloading matched pairs, but the Auto-5 is a shotgun, not a pistol.
Iron Eye is not applicable; Crown & King is semi-auto, not pump/bolt/lever.

weapons.name: Dolch 96
weapons.description: Powerful, German, prototype, semi-automatic pistol with an internal magazine loaded from the top. When fully emptied, it can be reloaded fast with a ten-round stripper clip.

trait_synergies.reason: Ambidextrous speeds up the custom clip reload for semi-auto pistols like the Dolch.
Fanning only works on single-action pistols; Dolch 96 is semi-auto, no benefit.
Steady Hand tightens Dolch's scope sway, enhancing accuracy for its high-damage semi-auto fire.

weapons.name: Drilling
weapons.description: Two medium rifle barrels combined with a shotgun underbarrel to create an all-round flexible and powerful weapon.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye keeps you in ironsights between shots, useful for the Drilling's rifle and shotgun modes.

weapons.name: Katana
weapons.description: A two-handed sword refined over hundreds of years to slice and pierce even the sturdiest armor, making human flesh effortless to rend. Special attack enabled with Martialist Trait .

weapons.name: Lebel 1886
weapons.description: The Lebel 1886, groundbreaking for its time, is a bolt-action rifle with an internal 10-round magazine. Slightly outperformed by more modern designs, it remains a powerful weapon of choice.

trait_synergies.reason: Allows faster follow-up shots by keeping the sight picture after each bolt-action cycle.

weapons.name: LeMat Mark II Revolver
weapons.description: Infamous icon of the Confederacy, this updated model takes nine cartridges in its cylinder. Its second barrel delivers a shotgun blast up close.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers; LeMat is single-action.
Iron Eye does not affect revolvers; it only works on bolt/lever/pump actions.

weapons.name: Machete
weapons.description: Used both for cutting through undergrowth and limbs, a machete is a reliable weapon to forge a path.

weapons.name: Mako 1895 Carbine
weapons.description: Long range, lever-action rifle that delivers a powerful punch with long ammo. From a new manufacturer in competition with Winfield.

trait_synergies.reason: Keeps sights aligned after levering, enabling quicker consecutive shots.
Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action, making it deadly in close quarters.

weapons.name: Martini-Henry IC1
weapons.description: The workhorse rifle of the British Empire, the Martini-Henry IC1 is a single-shot breech-loading rifle that values simplicity and power.

weapons.name: Mosin-Nagant M1891
weapons.description: Modern Imperial Russian bolt-action service rifle with an internal magazine, firing powerful long cartridges. When fully emptied, can be reloaded fast with a five-round stripper clip.

trait_synergies.reason: Maintains iron sight view after bolt cycling for faster target reacquisition.

weapons.name: Nagant M1895
weapons.description: Modern, Imperial Russian, single-action revolver. Slow to reload. Sacrifices stopping power for an extra bullet in the drum and a higher rate of fire.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers; Nagant M1895 is single-action.

weapons.name: Nagant M1895 Officer
weapons.description: Modern, Imperial Russian, double-action revolver. Though it has a faster rate of fire, the stronger force required to pull the trigger has a negative impact on accuracy.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning only works on single-action pistols; Officer is double-action, no benefit.

weapons.name: Nitro Express Rifle
weapons.description: Powerful, side-by-side, big game hunting rifle that can bring down the largest targets at mid-range. Carries limited ammunition.

weapons.name: Quad Derringer
weapons.description: A small, light pistol that is easy to carry and conceal. Holds four shots. Twelve additional rounds carried.

trait_synergies.reason: Ambidextrous speeds up reloading matched pairs, but the Derringer is not semi-auto.
Fanning only works on single-action revolvers; Derringer is not a revolver, no benefit.
Steady Hand reduces Derringer's scope sway, making its precise shots more reliable at range.

weapons.name: Railroad Hammer
weapons.description: Large mallet designed to hammer railroad spikes into their tracks, repurposed to hammer heads into the dirt.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee effectiveness of throwing knives/axes, not the hammer.
Blade Seer highlights the Hammer in Dark Sight, useful for retrieval after throwing.

weapons.name: Romero 77
weapons.description: Classic break-action shotgun with a long barrel. Good range and power for a shotgun. Has to reload after every shot.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye does not apply to single-shot shotguns; only bolt/lever/pump actions.

weapons.name: Scottfield Model 3
weapons.description: A classic, single-action break open revolver, the Scottfield has seen both sides of the law. The break action allows for quicker ejecting of spent rounds, meaning a faster overall reload when empty.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning drastically increases the Scottfield's fire rate, making it a close-range powerhouse.

weapons.name: Sparks LRR
weapons.description: Renowned, large-bore, single-shot rifle with good sights. Can put down a bison across a prairie.

weapons.name: Specter 1882
weapons.description: Revolutionary pump-action shotgun with long barrel, able to fire shells in rapid succession. Reloading the internal magazine takes time, due to its clunky, unrefined loading sequence.

trait_synergies.reason: Keeps sights up after pump action, allowing rapid follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Springfield 1866
weapons.description: A breech-loading rifle with a .50-70 caliber centerfire cartridge, the Springfield 1866 is best known for its quick rate of fire.

weapons.name: Springfield M1892 Krag
weapons.description: The Springfield M1892 Krag is a bolt-action rifle that holds five rounds in its internal magazine, and one in its chamber. Its magazine lid allows the wielder to top it up from the side, without opening the bolt, and ejecting the chambered round.

trait_synergies.reason: Remains in iron sights after bolt cycle, improving shot consistency.

weapons.name: Vetterli 71 Karabiner
weapons.description: Swiss military, bolt-action carbine with internal magazine. Powerful at medium distances. Reloading is inspired by the Winfield repeater rifle, making it easy to top up ammunition.

trait_synergies.reason: Stays in iron sights after bolt action, aiding quick follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Winfield 1887 Terminus
weapons.description: Seminal lever-action repeating shotgun. Boasting a balance between power and rate-of-fire, this became an icon of the era. Chamber 5+2 shells.

trait_synergies.reason: Lets you stay aimed between lever-action shots, improving follow-up accuracy with the shotgun.
Boosts hip-fire rate for lever-action shotgun, allowing rapid close-range blasts.

weapons.name: Winfield 1893 Slate
weapons.description: An exposed hammer shotgun that replaces lever-action with pump-action, this Winfield Model 93 holds several 12-gauge rounds to cause devastating damage to opponents.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant allows throwing the Slate's melee as a projectile, increasing ranged melee options.
Blade Seer highlights the Slate's melee in Dark Sight, aiding in tracking thrown attacks.
Keeps you in iron sights between lever-action shots, maintaining aim for quick follow-ups.
Speeds up hip-fire levering, enabling faster shotgun follow-ups in melee range.

weapons.name: Winfield M1873
weapons.description: Iconic repeating rifle with very large internal magazine, capable of firing compact bullets at rapid speed. Reload is very simple, making an ammo top-up a quick job.

trait_synergies.reason: Allows continuous aiming through lever cycles, boosting accuracy and fire rate control.
Levering increases hip-fire rate, maximizing the Winfield's lever-action spam potential at close range.

weapons.name: Winfield M1873C
weapons.description: Lightened repeating rifle with demi-size internal magazine, capable of firing compact bullets at rapid speed.

trait_synergies.reason: Enables staying aimed between lever-action shots, enhancing precision and speed.
Levering boosts hip-fire rate, making the compact Winfield even deadlier in close-quarters spam.

weapons.name: Winfield M1876 Centennial
weapons.description: Powerful repeating rifle chambered for larger ammunition than previous models. The magazine holds 9 rounds.

trait_synergies.reason: Remain scoped between lever cycles, improving accuracy and follow-up shot speed.
Levering offsets the Centennial's slower fire rate by enabling rapid hip-fire spam.
